title: amomum lacteum
intro: Amomum lacteum, also known as white amomum or white cardamom, is a type of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Amomum lacteum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce nausea and vomiting, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Amomum lacteum is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in various traditional remedies, such as infusions and decoctions.
